statement_option_selection_label: Select the option letter for the statement that is {requested_truth_phrase}.
From the statement options shown in the image, which one is {requested_truth_phrase}?
Choose the displayed statement option that is {requested_truth_phrase}.
category_panel_greater_than_threshold_co: For category "{condition_category_label}", how many dashboard panels show a value {panel_condition_phrase}?
For category "{condition_category_label}" across all panels, count the panels where its value is {panel_condition_phrase}.
Using the shared category label "{condition_category_label}", how many panels satisfy the condition that its value is {panel_condition_phrase}?
Across the dashboard, count panels in which category "{condition_category_label}" has a value {panel_condition_phrase}.
What is the number of panels where "{condition_category_label}" meets the value condition {panel_condition_phrase}?
category_panel_less_than_threshold_count: For category "{condition_category_label}", how many dashboard panels show a value {panel_condition_phrase}?
For category "{condition_category_label}" across all panels, count the panels where its value is {panel_condition_phrase}.
Using the shared category label "{condition_category_label}", how many panels satisfy the condition that its value is {panel_condition_phrase}?
Across the dashboard, count panels in which category "{condition_category_label}" has a value {panel_condition_phrase}.
What is the number of panels where "{condition_category_label}" meets the value condition {panel_condition_phrase}?
largest_category_panel_label: For category "{target_category_label}", which dashboard panel shows the largest value?
Across all dashboard panels, find category "{target_category_label}". Which panel has its largest value?
Which panel title corresponds to the highest value for "{target_category_label}"?
Look only at category "{target_category_label}" in each panel. Which panel is largest?
For the shared category "{target_category_label}", report the panel with the greatest value.
smallest_category_panel_label: For category "{target_category_label}", which dashboard panel shows the smallest value?
Across all dashboard panels, find category "{target_category_label}". Which panel has its smallest value?
Which panel title corresponds to the lowest value for "{target_category_label}"?
Look only at category "{target_category_label}" in each panel. Which panel is smallest?
For the shared category "{target_category_label}", report the panel with the least value.
largest_category_total_label: Which category label has the largest total across all dashboard panels? {unanswerable_instruction}
Sum each category across every panel. Which category has the largest total? {unanswerable_instruction}
Across the dashboard, which shared category label has the greatest combined value? {unanswerable_instruction}
Add each category's values over all panels. Which category is largest overall? {unanswerable_instruction}
What category label has the highest total when all panels are combined? {unanswerable_instruction}
smallest_category_total_label: Which category label has the smallest total across all dashboard panels? {unanswerable_instruction}
Sum each category across every panel. Which category has the smallest total? {unanswerable_instruction}
Across the dashboard, which shared category label has the least combined value? {unanswerable_instruction}
Add each category's values over all panels. Which category is smallest overall? {unanswerable_instruction}
What category label has the lowest total when all panels are combined? {unanswerable_instruction}
largest_panel_value_range_label: Which dashboard panel has the largest spread between its category values?
Find the panel whose category values span the widest range. What is its panel title?
Across the dashboard, which panel has the greatest difference between its largest and smallest category values?
Which panel title belongs to the widest category-value range?
Compare each panel's largest and smallest category values. Which panel has the largest range?
smallest_panel_value_range_label: Which dashboard panel has the smallest spread between its category values?
Find the panel whose category values span the narrowest range. What is its panel title?
Across the dashboard, which panel has the least difference between its largest and smallest category values?
Which panel title belongs to the narrowest category-value range?
Compare each panel's largest and smallest category values. Which panel has the smallest range?
panel_value_range_value: In the "{selected_panel_name}" panel, what is the difference between its largest and smallest category values?
For the dashboard panel named "{selected_panel_name}", subtract its smallest category value from its largest category value. What is the result?
Using only "{selected_panel_name}", what range do its category values span from smallest to largest?
Within "{selected_panel_name}", find the largest and smallest category values. What is their difference?
What is the value range in "{selected_panel_name}", computed as largest category value minus smallest category value?
largest_panel_total_label: Which dashboard panel has the largest total across all of its category values?
Sum the category values within each panel. Which panel has the largest total?
Across the dashboard, what panel title has the greatest combined category value?
Add all category values in each panel. Which panel is largest overall?
Which panel title corresponds to the highest total over its categories?
smallest_panel_total_label: Which dashboard panel has the smallest total across all of its category values?
Sum the category values within each panel. Which panel has the smallest total?
Across the dashboard, what panel title has the least combined category value?
Add all category values in each panel. Which panel is smallest overall?
Which panel title corresponds to the lowest total over its categories?
global_maximum_value_category_label: Which category label has the single largest value anywhere in the dashboard?
Across every panel and category, find the highest displayed value. What category label does it belong to?
What category label is attached to the dashboard's global maximum value?
Find the one largest value in the whole dashboard. Which category label is it for?
Looking across all panels, which category has the highest value overall?
global_minimum_value_category_label: Which category label has the single smallest value anywhere in the dashboard?
Across every panel and category, find the lowest displayed value. What category label does it belong to?
What category label is attached to the dashboard's global minimum value?
Find the one smallest value in the whole dashboard. Which category label is it for?
Looking across all panels, which category has the lowest value overall?
largest_source_rank_target_value: In the "{source_panel_name}" panel, find the category with the {rank_phrase} value. What is that same category's value in the "{target_panel_name}" panel?
Use "{source_panel_name}" to identify the {rank_phrase} category, then give its value in "{target_panel_name}".
Which value does "{target_panel_name}" show for the category ranked {rank_phrase} in "{source_panel_name}"?
First rank categories in "{source_panel_name}"; for the {rank_phrase} one, what value appears in "{target_panel_name}"?
Find the {rank_phrase} category in "{source_panel_name}". Report its integer value from "{target_panel_name}".
smallest_source_rank_target_value: In the "{source_panel_name}" panel, find the category with the {rank_phrase} value. What is that same category's value in the "{target_panel_name}" panel?
Use "{source_panel_name}" to identify the {rank_phrase} category, then give its value in "{target_panel_name}".
Which value does "{target_panel_name}" show for the category ranked {rank_phrase} in "{source_panel_name}"?
First rank categories in "{source_panel_name}"; for the {rank_phrase} one, what value appears in "{target_panel_name}"?
Find the {rank_phrase} category in "{source_panel_name}". Report its integer value from "{target_panel_name}".

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:statement_option_selection_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the selected option letter as a capital letter
query:statement_option_selection_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of two [x,y] pixel points on the chart marks that verify the selected statement

query:category_panel_greater_than_thresh.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:category_panel_greater_than_thresh.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on each counted category mark

query:category_panel_less_than_threshold.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:category_panel_less_than_threshold.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on each counted category mark

query:largest_category_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel title as a string
query:largest_category_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the target category mark in the answer panel

query:smallest_category_panel_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel title as a string
query:smallest_category_panel_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the target category mark in the answer panel

query:largest_category_total_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible category label as a string, or "unanswerable" if any category is not shown in every dashboard panel
query:largest_category_total_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on that category's mark in every panel; if the answer is "unanswerable", use an empty array

query:smallest_category_total_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible category label as a string, or "unanswerable" if any category is not shown in every dashboard panel
query:smallest_category_total_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on that category's mark in every panel; if the answer is "unanswerable", use an empty array

query:largest_panel_value_range_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel title as a string
query:largest_panel_value_range_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "largest_value" and "smallest_value" to [x,y] pixel points on the two category marks that define the answer panel's range

query:smallest_panel_value_range_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel title as a string
query:smallest_panel_value_range_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "largest_value" and "smallest_value" to [x,y] pixel points on the two category marks that define the answer panel's range

query:panel_value_range_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer difference
query:panel_value_range_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "largest_value" and "smallest_value" to [x,y] pixel points on those category marks in the named panel

query:largest_panel_total_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel title as a string
query:largest_panel_total_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every category mark in the answer panel

query:smallest_panel_total_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible panel title as a string
query:smallest_panel_total_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on every category mark in the answer panel

query:global_maximum_value_category_labe.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible category label as a string
query:global_maximum_value_category_labe.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the global maximum category mark

query:global_minimum_value_category_labe.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible category label as a string
query:global_minimum_value_category_labe.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to one [x,y] pixel point on the global minimum category mark

query:largest_source_rank_target_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer value
query:largest_source_rank_target_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "source_panel" and "target_panel" to [x,y] pixel points on the selected category marks in those panels

query:smallest_source_rank_target_value.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer value
query:smallest_source_rank_target_value.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object mapping "source_panel" and "target_panel" to [x,y] pixel points on the selected category marks in those panels
